purpose: Prevent patch pileup, duplicated runtime loaders, and accidental rollback to older engine behavior.

activeRuntimeFiles.role: Core game loop, player state, map render, radar, bug spawn, catch mini-game, base dex/quest/save hooks
activeRuntimeFiles.notes: Primary core owner. Avoid creating patch files that repeatedly rewrite map, radar, or catch loop.

activeRuntimeFiles.role: Badge and title UI/data
activeRuntimeFiles.notes: Keep title/badge logic here.

activeRuntimeFiles.role: Time and weather state
activeRuntimeFiles.notes: Does not own map rendering.

activeRuntimeFiles.role: Economy resources and currency logic
activeRuntimeFiles.notes: Used by menu/equipment systems.

activeRuntimeFiles.role: Profile HUD and player profile UI
activeRuntimeFiles.notes: Do not duplicate profile rendering elsewhere.

activeRuntimeFiles.role: NPC lab UI and lab-related interactions
activeRuntimeFiles.notes: Research/lab logic belongs here.

activeRuntimeFiles.role: Legendary event discovery and encounter logic
activeRuntimeFiles.notes: Legendary dex should be integrated here or in a single dex owner, not separate fix layers.

activeRuntimeFiles.role: Return/Bug Hole discovery state
activeRuntimeFiles.notes: Works with BUG HOLE, but does not own menu navigation.

activeRuntimeFiles.role: Return stone resources and interaction
activeRuntimeFiles.notes: Resource feature only.

activeRuntimeFiles.role: Bottom menu and main modal entry screens
activeRuntimeFiles.notes: Menu screen owner. Do not reintroduce separate modal-nav guard unless integrated.

activeRuntimeFiles.role: Economy menu panels
activeRuntimeFiles.notes: Only economy UI.

activeRuntimeFiles.role: BUG HOLE UI and installation/dismantle/progress logic
activeRuntimeFiles.notes: Do not capture unrelated menu/back/close events.

activeRuntimeFiles.role: BUG HOLE map markers
activeRuntimeFiles.notes: Visual marker layer only.

activeRuntimeFiles.role: Active item data and bonuses
activeRuntimeFiles.notes: Bonus calculations should be read-only to other systems.

activeRuntimeFiles.role: Bridge active item bonuses into game systems
activeRuntimeFiles.notes: Bridge only. Do not duplicate full item logic.

activeRuntimeFiles.role: Backpack bottom menu and inventory UI
activeRuntimeFiles.notes: User approved 5 bottom menus including backpack.

activeRuntimeFiles.role: Save/reset cleanup and data reset protection
activeRuntimeFiles.notes: Reset should include GPS/NPC/BUG HOLE/backpack data where relevant.

activeRuntimeFiles.role: Random NPC generation implementation
activeRuntimeFiles.notes: Should eventually own CATCHABUGS_RANDOM_NPC directly.

activeRuntimeFiles.role: Fallback bridge for NPC API when random NPC API is unavailable
activeRuntimeFiles.notes: Temporary bridge. Prefer integrating API into random-npc.js later.

activeRuntimeFiles.role: Mobile GPS/explorer mode position tracking
activeRuntimeFiles.notes: GPS uses north-up world coordinates. It must not rotate movement by compass heading.

activeRuntimeFiles.role: Radar compact info and explorer mode toggle button
activeRuntimeFiles.notes: Compass is direction reference only. It must not rotate map/GPS by default.

disabledRuntimeFiles.reason: Duplicate map/region styling and region behavior.
Visual layer caused additional DOM/style overrides. Reintegrate intentionally later.
Map/region guard layer duplicated main map ownership.
Dex add-on disabled during runtime cleanup.
Legendary dex fix layer disabled; should be merged into single dex/legendary owner.
Dex guard layer disabled to reduce modal/dex overrides.
Dex grade lights disabled temporarily; should be reintegrated without overriding dex repeatedly.
Modal navigation guard disabled to reduce menu/back ownership conflicts.
General cleanup layer disabled; too broad.
Old bootstrap loaded additional systems and revived patch pile behavior.

futureUpdateProtocol: Fetch current index.html before any runtime change.
Do not re-add disabledRuntimeFiles unless explicitly migrating their logic into an active owner.
For a new feature, pick one active owner file or create one new owner file and list it in this manifest.
Never replace index.html from an older snapshot.
When updating index.html, preserve the latest script list unless intentionally changing runtime ownership.
